etymology.description: semantic: č‰ą (cÇŽo, "grass") + phonetic: äşĄ (hĂ i, "twelfth earthly branch") = grass + phonetic element suggesting roots -> roots
etymology.interpretation: In the character čŤ„, the č‰ą (cÇŽo, "grass") component suggests the natural element of the plant, while the phonetic component äşĄ (hĂ i) adds its sound value, together these elements illustrate roots within the grass or plant family.
